items.example: It's a close-knit community where everyone knows each other.
In a good community, neighbours are always a shoulder to cry on.
The villagers built the house together — many hands make light work.

items.idiom: it takes a village to raise a child
items.translation: нужна целая деревня, чтобы воспитать ребёнка
items.example: On the island, everyone helps with the children — it takes a village to raise a child.
The local school is the backbone of the community.
The island is completely off the beaten track.
